query:
-- Create a new imaginary flight with 5 GPS waypoints
INSERT INTO flights (project_id, name, description, flight_date, pilot_name, faa_license, laanc_auth, warranty_start, warranty_end, location, client_name, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  1,
  'NYC Aerial Survey',
  'High-resolution aerial survey of Manhattan with 5 GPS waypoints',
  DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY),
  'Joe Pilot',
  '11111111',
  'LAANC',
  '2026-01-01',
  '2028-01-01',
  'Manhattan, New York',
  'SkyVee Aerial Drone Services',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Get the flight ID
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as flight_id;
